description: Canonical version manifest for freshness tracking. Single source of truth for dependency versions across L0/L1/L2. monitor_urls here are checked by /monitor-docs independently of doc frontmatters.

kmp.description: Kotlin Multiplatform projects (Android + Desktop + iOS + macOS). Requires AGP 9.0+.

android-only.description: Android-only projects using com.android.library. Compatible with AGP 8.x — no migration required.
android-only.agp_note: AGP 8.x uses com.android.library plugin and android {} DSL block. flat-module-names rule does NOT apply (AGP 9+ bug only).

version_notes.agp: KMP projects only. Android-only projects use agp-android-only (8.x) — do not force migration to 9.0.
version_notes.agp-android-only: com.android.library projects on AGP 8.x. Compatible with KMP L0 patterns except flat-module-names and KmpLibraryConventionPlugin — use AndroidLibraryConventionPlugin instead.
version_notes.ksp: Kotlin Symbol Processing. Version format: <kotlin-version>-<ksp-release>. Must match kotlin version exactly — always update together. Listed in coupled_versions.
version_notes.compose-multiplatform: JetBrains Compose Multiplatform plugin (org.jetbrains.compose). KMP only.
version_notes.compose-gradle-plugin: Google Compose Compiler Gradle plugin (org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.compose). In KMP, the Kotlin plugin version drives the compiler; this entry tracks the Compose compiler integration plugin version.
version_notes.turbine: Testing library for Kotlin Flows (app.cash.turbine). Not in KMP convention plugin — add to test dependencies manually.
version_notes.junit5: JUnit Jupiter (org.junit.jupiter). Requires useJUnitPlatform() in test config — add to AndroidLibraryConventionPlugin for consistency.
version_notes.kotlinx-serialization: kotlinx-serialization-json (org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json). Pair with org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization Gradle plugin.

wildcard_note: Entries with 'x' (e.g., 1.7.x) match any patch version. Compare major.minor only for wildcard entries.
